name: automotive-dealership
description: Automotive dealership operations specialist team — 5 agents covering the full dealership P&L: dealership-ops-lead (store KPIs, daily operating report, variable/fixed-ops mix), fixed-ops-analyst (service & parts, absorption rate, ELR, technician productivity, CSI), fni-advisor (F&I process, PVR, product penetration, lender relationships, compliant — no payment packing), inventory-and-desking-analyst (new/used days-supply, floor-plan cost, recon, sales desking), dealership-compliance-advisor (GLBA Safeguards, NPI handling, OFAC/Red Flags, advertising disclosure). Ships 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 6 best-practices, 1 advisory hook, and a dealer calculator script. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
